name: Clym
description: Clym — GDPR, CCPA, and LGPD privacy compliance platform with consent management, DSR automation, and cookie scanning.

seo.title: Clym — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Clym: Clym — GDPR, CCPA, and LGPD privacy compliance platform with consent management, DSR automation, and cookie scanning.

when_to_use: GDPR consent management with data subject request automation
CCPA opt-out compliance for US consumer-facing apps
LGPD cookie banner for Brazilian market expansion
Cookie scanning and categorization for privacy audits

pros: Covers GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, and many regional laws in one
Automated DSR intake and fulfillment workflow
Cookie scanner plus consent UI in a single product
Pricing transparent and affordable for SMB
cons: Brand recognition weaker than OneTrust or Didomi
Fewer customization options for complex publisher setups
Integrations with CDPs and analytics tools limited
Support response quality uneven across reviews
review.verdict: A pragmatic all-in-one privacy tool for SMBs — enterprise publishers will hit ceilings fast.
review.best_for: SMB websites needing GDPR, CCPA, and DSR coverage without OneTrust pricing
review.not_for: Large publishers with TCF, complex vendors, or enterprise CMP needs
